title: skills:list-skills
description: Use case for listing all available skills in the repository.
context: Use case for listing all available skills in the repository.

rules:
The input MUST be an empty object:

```typescript
interface ListSkillsInput {}
```
The use case MUST call `SkillRepository.list()` and return the result.

constraints: No validation needed for empty input.

scenarios.name: Empty input
when: ListSkills use case is executed with empty input
